topics.title: AI/ML for Bank Supervision
topics.description: Application of artificial intelligence and machine learning techniques to enhance banking supervision and regulatory oversight.
bullets: Predictive models for identifying risks in supervised entities
Anomaly detection in financial reporting data
Automated risk scoring and early warning systems
Machine learning for stress testing and scenario analysis
AI-driven assessment of bank business models

topics.title: NLP for Regulatory Reporting
topics.description: Natural language processing applied to regulatory documents, compliance monitoring, and supervisory communication.
bullets: Automated analysis of regulatory filings and disclosures
Text mining of supervisory reports and assessments
Sentiment analysis of central bank communications
Information extraction from annual reports and prospectuses

topics.title: LLMs in Supervision
topics.description: Large language models and generative AI for supervisory processes and regulatory technology.
bullets: Generative AI for drafting supervisory assessments
Ethical considerations and hallucination risks in supervisory AI
